log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Locathah — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Locathah — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Locathah — Iron Concentration HP: 48/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 10 damage. Locathah — Iron Concentration HP: 38/67
--- Locathah — Iron Concentration --- HP: 38/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Locathah — Iron Concentration --- HP: 42/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Locathah — Iron Concentration --- HP: 42/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Locathah — Iron Concentration --- HP: 42/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18

→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Locathah — Iron Concentration HP: 27/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):16+8=24 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Locathah — Iron Concentration HP: 12/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):17+8=25 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Locathah — Iron Concentration --- HP: 12/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person

→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
